name: Sprint Task
about: Delivery unit for Branchforge sprint execution
title: "[S00] "
labels: ["task"]
assignees: []
---

## Context
- Why this task exists

## Objective
- What outcome must be achieved

## Dependencies
- Upstream tasks/docs this task depends on

## Scope
- [ ] In scope item 1
- [ ] In scope item 2

## Out of scope
- Explicitly list what is excluded

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Artifacts
- [ ] Code changes
- [ ] Tests on required level
- [ ] Docs updates (if contracts/architecture changed)

## Verification
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`

## Docs sync
- [ ] Related docs updated
